data.content: Plan revision needed before implementation. The normalization root cause in checkPromptGuidance() is real, but the plan is incomplete: PROMPT_KNOTS.md currently has no FOOLERY_PROMPT_PROFILE line while doctor/fix logic always requires one, so updating only PROMPT.md leaves the knots template path inconsistent. The replace-vs-append change also needs to specify single-block canonicalization behavior for files that already contain multiple guidance blocks, because the current duplicated-block state is part of the observed failure mode. Please revise the plan to include: (1) aligning PROMPT_KNOTS.md with the doctor heuristic or explicitly changing the heuristic/template contract, and (2) explicit regression tests for runDoctorFix on mismatched/duplicated guidance blocks plus the knots template path.
